name: Conservation
domain: Energy, momentum, charge, angular momentum — quantities unchanged by system evolution
core_insight: Conserved quantities are the skeleton of physics. What cannot change constrains everything else. Conservation laws are both diagnostic (find violations = new physics) and generative (they produce equations of motion via Noether's theorem).

key_equations.name: Energy Conservation
key_equations.why: Total energy is fixed in an isolated system — the most universal constraint in physics

key_equations.name: Charge Conservation
key_equations.why: Continuity equation: charge cannot be created or destroyed, only moved — the current-density form

key_equations.name: Angular Momentum Conservation
key_equations.why: Changes only when external torque acts; explains gyroscopes, planetary orbits, and spinning dancers

seed_prompt: ↺ List what is conserved. These are the invariants that bound all possible trajectories.
